waiting_for_customer: Waiting for the customer to complete the payment on the POS terminal.
transaction_timeout_message: We stopped waiting for an outcome from the terminal. Please verify the payment status on the POS device directly before retrying.
selected_payment_method_not_supported: Selected payment method is not supported.
pinelabs_disabled_reason_no_terminals: No Pinelabs terminals configured for this facility.
toast_payment_partially_completed: Payment partially completed on the terminal
toast_transaction_timed_out: Transaction timed out. Please verify the status on the terminal.
toast_collect_payment_on_terminal: Collect the payment on the POS terminal
toast_wait_for_transaction: Please wait for the transaction to complete or cancel it.
error_account_required: Account is required to record a payment
error_tendered_amount_must_be_positive: Tendered amount must be greater than zero
error_returned_amount_must_be_less: Returned amount must be less than tendered amount
